### `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/email_act.py`

**Issue 1: `sys.path.insert` inside the activity (line 22-23)**
This runs on every activity invocation, prepending to `sys.path` each time — causing the path list to grow unboundedly across retries and repeated calls. Move it to module level (top of file, after standard imports).

**Issue 2: `asyncio.get_event_loop()` (line 25)**
Deprecated since Python 3.10; will emit a DeprecationWarning ...(truncated)
